'''Dar Bille''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yevetha]]n commander.

During [[Nil Spaar]]'s operation to seize [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Dar Bille was the future [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy's]] [[Executive officer/Legends|second-in-command]]. Dar Bille led Spaar's backup assault team through [[Section 21]] in the seizure of the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Intimidator'']].

When Nil Spaar ordered the execution of the [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]], Dar Bille served as [[Primate/Legends|Primate]] of the ''Intimidator'', renamed ''Pride of Yevetha'', and led a number of strikes throughout the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]].
